problems.title: Inversions (CSES)
problems.pattern: Count the number of inversions in a permutation — classic Merge Sort modification

problems.title: Counting Inversions
problems.pattern: Merge Sort modification to count pairs (i, j) where i < j and a[i] > a[j]

problems.title: Merge k Sorted Lists
problems.pattern: K-way merge using a min-heap — extends the two-way merge step to K simultaneous sorted sequences

problems.title: Smallest Range Covering Elements from K Lists
problems.pattern: K-way merge with a sliding window — combine K-way merge with range optimisation

problems.title: Global Inversions and Local Inversions
problems.pattern: Count global inversions using Merge Sort, compare with local inversion count (adjacent pairs)
